description: Tracks questions asked via /kb:ask with answer quality, confidence, and source attribution for knowledge base improvement over time.

Query.description: The question asked by the user

Answered.description: Whether the query was successfully answered (true) or returned 'I don't know' (false)

Confidence.description: Confidence level of the answer based on source quality and relevance. 'None' for no-answer pathway.

Sources Used.description: Number of sources cited in the answer

Source Names.description: Comma-separated names of cited source documents

Sources Searched.description: Comma-separated list of sources queried (e.g., 'notion, drive')

Top Score.description: Highest relevance score (0-100) among retrieved sources

Answer Excerpt.description: First 200 characters of the synthesized answer for quick review

Asked At.description: Timestamp when the query was submitted

notes: Idempotent by Query text (case-insensitive) + same calendar day: update if found, create if not. Query tracking is optional and only writes when Notion is available. The /kb:find and /kb:index commands do not write to this database.
